seoTitle: How to Change the Name on Your Coursera Certificate
metaDescription: Fix the name shown on a Coursera certificate before sharing it, with steps to access your certificate settings and update it accurately.
intro: A certificate with the wrong name on it isn't something you want to send to an employer, so it's worth fixing before you share it anywhere. This covers accessing your certificate settings, updating your name, and reviewing the change before finalizing your certificate.

steps.heading: Access your Coursera certificate
steps.body: Sign in to Coursera and open the certificate you want to update the name on.

steps.heading: Find the name change option
steps.body: Look for the setting tied to your profile or certificate details where the name field can be edited.

steps.heading: Enter and save your correct name
steps.body: Update the name field with the correct version you want reflected on the certificate.

steps.heading: Review your changes before sharing
steps.body: Double-check the certificate reflects the correct name before sending it to an employer or posting it anywhere.

faq.question: Why would the name on my certificate be wrong in the first place?
faq.answer: It's usually tied to how your profile name was entered when you signed up, which may not match what you want shown publicly.

faq.question: Does changing my certificate name affect my account name everywhere?
faq.answer: It depends on how the setting is tied to your profile, so review what else the name change updates before confirming.

faq.question: How quickly does the name update show on the certificate?
faq.answer: The update should reflect on the certificate shortly after you save the change, though it's worth double-checking before sharing it.

faq.question: Is this important for job applications?
faq.answer: Yes, having your correct name on the certificate matters for how professionally it presents when shared with employers.
